clarity.notes: The product now reads as one coherent app shell, and the expansion-plan pages are clearly separated by task.

hierarchy.notes: Each screen has one dominant action area: monitor table, add form, detail history, auth, or settings section.

typography.notes: The serif display plus system body plus mono metadata create a more professional Claude-like tone without over-styling.

motion.notes: Interactions stay restrained. Only hover, submit feedback, and lightweight state changes are used.

brand.notes: The three supplied neutrals drive the full system, with warmer borders and quiet surfaces instead of sketch textures.
